meaning: n.勤勉,刻苦,一丝不苟的作风
examples: He shows great assiduity in all his work.
Knowlege is gained from assiduity, unwisdom is resulted from sluttery!
That "Your requirement is our pursuing" is Zhongli is assiduity and promise.
Those who have invested in his companies have reason to appreciate his assiduity.
